scope: dtfbank live api endpoint and factoryengine-dtfbank-app container log

body.message: Your credit balance is too low to access the Anthropic API. Please go to Plans & Billing to upgrade or purchase credits.

containerLog.message: Your credit balance is too low to access the Anthropic API. Please go to Plans & Billing to upgrade or purchase credits.

conclusion.blockingRequirement: Bitti requires a successful test transcript JSON output.
conclusion.currentFailureMode: TenantConfig Anthropic key reaches Anthropic, but Anthropic rejects message generation because the account has no credits.
conclusion.nextRequiredInput: Add credits to the Anthropic account or provide a credited Anthropic API key.
